title: The Useful Pack
description: The Useful Pack, Is a pack centered around optimization with full vanilla compatibility and feel.
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheUsefulLists/assets/main/Images/Promo.png)](www.bisecthosting.com/UsefulLists)

Welcome to the The Useful Pack a pack created behind the creators of [The Useful Mods List](https://github.com/TheUsefulLists/UsefulMods/tree/main) on github.
This pack contains optimization mods and a few QOL mods, But we have left out any mods that changes vanilla looks and feel. Most Optifine resourcepacks should work with this modpack and you can zoom with z.

Comes preinstalled with shaders simply go to video settings and shaders if you wish to use them or just leave them off.
